[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 11000100 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 01000100 2
5 10001100 3
6 00000010 1
7 00011010 3

01 01000000 1
12 10001100 3 match 5
23 00000000 a match 1 2 3
34 00010000 1
45 10101100 4
56 00000000 a match 1 2 3
67 00010011 3
70 10000000 1
